title: oziroe arida
side_effects: Oziroe arida can have side effects if used improperly, such as nausea, dizziness, and vomiting due to its high concentration of toxic compounds. Prolonged exposure to the plant's extracts can also lead to headaches, fatigue, and stomach cramps in some individuals. In severe cases, misuse of oziroe arida can cause more serious health issues like organ damage, respiratory problems, and even allergic reactions. It's essential to consult a medical professional before using the plant for medicinal purposes to avoid any potential risks.
